ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable. ICC-accredited certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable. Single page invoice.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-25D-389953 which is a certificate reference number, not an LC reference. No fields labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar banktermbenämningar found.

search_results.context: Company branding/logo at top of invoice page
Company identification block at bottom of invoice: 'SKYLOTEC Nordic AB, Kontorsvägen 6, 246 43 Löddeköpinge, Sweden'

search_results.location: Invoice, page 1, right side stamp area
search_results.context: Company stamp/watermark: 'Skylotec Nordic AB, Kontorsvägen 6, 43 Löddeköpinge, SWEDEN'

pairing_validation.reasoning: All three criteria met: (1) Certificate remarks reference 'EXPORT INVOICE 209542' and invoice Sales Order No is 209542. (2) Consignor 'Skylotec Nordic AB' is identifiable in invoice footer and branding. (3) Consignee 'PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP' is identifiable in both Ship-to and Bill-to address fields.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Skylotec Nordic AB, Sagbäcksvägen 13, SE-437 31, LINDOME, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: SKYLOTEC Nordic AB, Kontorsvägen 6, 246 43 Löddeköpinge, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Skylotec Nordic AB' anywhere in invoice files.
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'SKYLOTEC Nordic AB' found in invoice footer company block, in branding/logo header ('SKYLOTEC'), and in company stamp area. Exact match of full company name 'SKYLOTEC Nordic AB' in footer.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that company name in certificate matches invoice issuer.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Skylotec Nordic AB'. Invoice footer: 'SKYLOTEC Nordic AB'. After normalization of case: identical. Same juridical entity.
Certificate country: 'Sweden'. Invoice footer explicitly states 'Sweden'. Additionally, VAT number prefix 'SE' in 'SE556996439701' confirms Sweden. Exact match.
Both documents indicate Sweden. Confirmed via explicit text and VAT prefix.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer and branding.
Country verification via indirect identifiers – VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Skylotec Nordic AB' in Sweden. The invoice is issued by 'SKYLOTEC Nordic AB' as shown in the footer company block with address 'Kontorsvägen 6, 246 43 Löddeköpinge, Sweden'. Note the street address differs (Sagbäcksvägen 13 in certificate vs Kontorsvägen 6 in invoice) but per rule 4.1.5 address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only company name and country matter. Company name matches exactly after case normalization. Country matches: both state Sweden, confirmed by VAT prefix SE.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address mismatch (Sagbäcksvägen 13 vs Kontorsvägen 6) could indicate different entities.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address or postal code do not constitute MISMATCH. The company name and country are verified. A company may have multiple offices.

checkpoints.certificate_value: PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP, F-68, First Floor, Sector-11 (UP), 201301, NOIDA, India
checkpoints.invoice_value: Paramahansa Defence LLP, F-68, Sector 11, NOIDA, 201301, India (Bill-to Address)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Bill-to Address identified as primary factureringsfält.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains both 'Ship-to Address' and 'Bill-to Address'. Per 4.2.0.2, Bill-to Address takes priority. Bill-to: 'Paramahansa Defence LLP, Pramod V Otayoth, F-68, Sector 11, NOIDA, 201301, India'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name to Bill-to party name.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP'. Invoice Bill-to: 'Paramahansa Defence LLP'. After case normalization: identical match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – Bill-to Address is the primary factureringsfält, takes precedence over Ship-to.
Company name verification – exact match after case normalization.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP' in India. Invoice Bill-to Address (primary per 4.2.0.2) states 'Paramahansa Defence LLP' at 'F-68, Sector 11, NOIDA, 201301, India'. Company name is identical after case normalization. Country matches exactly. The Bill-to address has 'Pramod V Otayoth' as contact person and uses 'F-68, Sector 11' vs certificate's 'F-68, First Floor, Sector-11 (UP)' — but per rule 4.2.4 address differences do not cause MISMATCH. Additionally, Ship-to Address also confirms the same company name and country, providing corroboration.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address detail differences (First Floor, Sector-11 (UP) vs Sector 11) indicate different entities.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.4, street address differences do not constitute MISMATCH when company name and country match. The address differences are minor formatting variations of the same location.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
POA-030-1, 1 PCS (SE)
ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER
checkpoints.invoice_value: POA-030-1 ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER

comparison_steps.description: Verify article number from certificate in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate article number: 'POA-030-1'. Invoice Item No: 'POA-030-1'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Priority 2: Text matching of identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER'. Invoice description: 'ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER'. Exact match after normalization of spaces.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate indicates '(SE)' after POA-030-1, denoting Sweden as origin for this article.
comparison_steps.result: Noted – only one origin country in box 3 (European Community), with per-article code (SE). Single article so mapping is unambiguous.
comparison_steps.details: Only one article listed, one origin country. Mapping is clear.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Article number exact match: POA-030-1 in both documents.
Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER' found exactly in invoice.
Additional text '1 PALLET, TOTAL WEIGHT 14 KG GW, CONTAINING THE BELOW ITEM' is non-identity-bearing packaging/shipping information.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description lists article POA-030-1 with description 'ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER'. Invoice item line shows exactly 'POA-030-1 ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER'. Both article number and product description match exactly. The certificate additionally contains packaging information ('1 PALLET, TOTAL WEIGHT 14 KG GW, CONTAINING THE BELOW ITEM') which is non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4 and does not affect verification. Per-article origin code '(SE)' maps to Sweden, consistent with European Community origin in box 3.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Net Weight: 12.5; Gross Weight: 14; DIMS: total weight 14 kg GW / NW 12,5 kg

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '12,5 KG NW'. This is the primary verification quantity.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7: '12,5 KG NW'. Numeric value 12.5, unit KG, category NW.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 12.5 as Net Weight in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Net Weight total: 12.5. Invoice item line Net Weight: 12.5. Invoice DIMS section: 'NW 12,5 kg'. All confirm 12.5 KG NW. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 6 states 'TOTAL WEIGHT 14 KG GW'. Check for contradiction in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Gross Weight total: 14. Invoice DIMS: 'total weight 14 kg GW'. Certificate GW 14 matches invoice GW 14. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 is verifieringsgrundande. Box 7 value: 12.5 KG NW.
Förekomstkontroll – 12.5 KG NW found in invoice Net Weight total field.
Multiple quantities – GW 14 KG from box 6 also matches invoice Gross Weight 14. No contradiction.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '12,5 KG NW' (12.5 kg net weight). Invoice total Net Weight field states '12.5'. Invoice DIMS section confirms 'NW 12,5 kg'. Exact numeric match. Certificate box 6 additionally states 'TOTAL WEIGHT 14 KG GW'. Invoice Gross Weight total: 14. Invoice DIMS: 'total weight 14 kg GW'. Both GW and NW match exactly between certificate and invoice. Per 4.4.3.1 at least one quantity verified (NW matches), and no contradiction exists for GW either.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice item line states 'Country of origin: SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EUROPEAN COMMUNITY'. Invoice states 'SE' (Sweden). Sweden is an EU member state.
comparison_steps.details: Per rule 4.5.4.2: If certificate states 'EU'/'European Union'/'European Community' and invoice states a specific EU member country → verified. Sweden (SE) is EU-27 member. MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no non-EU origin countries in invoice that are not covered by certificate.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains only 'SE' as origin. SE is EU member. No non-EU origins present.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization – Certificate 'European Community' verified against invoice 'SE' (Sweden, EU member state).
Normalization – ISO alpha-2 code 'SE' normalized to 'Sweden'.
No non-EU origins in invoice. No contradiction.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'EUROPEAN COMMUNITY'. Invoice item line states 'Country of origin: SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. Sweden is a current EU-27 member state (certificate issued 2025-11-05). Per rule 4.5.4.2, when certificate states 'European Community' and invoice states a specific EU member country, the origin is verified. Additionally, the per-article origin code '(SE)' in the certificate's box 6 is consistent with the invoice's 'SE' origin. No non-EU origins found in invoice.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate states 'European Community' but invoice states 'SE' specifically – these are different.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.5.4.2, EU/European Community/European Union ↔ specific EU member state is an explicitly allowed normalization. SE (Sweden) is EU-27 member. Verified.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-389953 is not an LC reference.
All three criteria met: invoice number 209542 matches, consignor Skylotec Nordic AB identifiable, consignee Paramahansa Defence LLP identifiable.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.details: Consignor 'Skylotec Nordic AB' found in invoice footer company block and branding. Direct identification successful.
VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556996439701 confirms Sweden. Also explicit 'Sweden' in footer.
Invoice has both Ship-to and Bill-to. Bill-to takes priority per 4.2.0.2.
PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP = Paramahansa Defence LLP after case normalization.
POA-030-1 exact match in both documents.
ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER – exact match.
Box 7 contains 12.5 KG NW. This is the primary verification quantity.
12.5 found as Net Weight total in invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Multiple quantities – GW check for contradiction
rule_evaluation_log.details: GW 14 in certificate matches Gross Weight 14 in invoice.
Certificate: European Community. Invoice: SE (Sweden). Sweden is EU-27 member. Verified.
Only SE found as origin in invoice. No non-EU origins.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Skylotec Nordic AB i Sverige bekräftas av fakturans utställare. Mottagaren Paramahansa Defence LLP i Indien bekräftas av fakturans Bill-to-adress. Varubeskrivning, artikelnummer, kvantitet och ursprungsland matchar. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

warnings.description: Consignor address differs between certificate (Sagbäcksvägen 13, LINDOME) and invoice (Kontorsvägen 6, Löddeköpinge). Per rules, address differences do not affect verification when company name and country match.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Skylotec Nordic AB, Sagbäcksvägen 13, SE-437 31, LINDOME, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: SKYLOTEC Nordic AB, Kontorsvägen 6, 246 43 Löddeköpinge, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering av consignor i fakturans utställarblock (koncernstruktur 4.1.0). Land verifierat via explicit text och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Skylotec Nordic AB' identifieras exakt i fakturans footer-block som 'SKYLOTEC Nordic AB'. Gatuadressen skiljer sig men detta påverkar inte bedömningen. Land Sverige bekräftas i båda dokumenten, samt via VAT-nummer SE556996439701.

sections.certificate_value: PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP, F-68, First Floor, Sector-11 (UP), 201301, NOIDA, India
sections.invoice_value: Paramahansa Defence LLP, Pramod V Otayoth, F-68, Sector 11, NOIDA, 201301, India (Bill-to Address)
sections.rule_applied: Consignee verifierad mot fakturans Bill-to Address (primärt faktureringsfält per 4.2.0.2). Företagsnamn och land matchar exakt efter normalisering.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP' i Indien identifieras i fakturans Bill-to Address som 'Paramahansa Defence LLP' i Indien. Exakt namnmatchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Land Indien matchar exakt.

sections.certificate_value:
POA-030-1, 1 PCS (SE)
ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER
sections.invoice_value: POA-030-1 ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER
sections.rule_applied: Prioritet 1 – Artikelnummer POA-030-1 matchar exakt. Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER' matchar exakt.
sections.motivation: Artikelnummer POA-030-1 matchar exakt mellan certifikat och faktura. Varubeskrivningen 'ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER' är identisk i båda dokumenten. Förpackningsinformation i certifikatet (1 PALLET etc.) är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.

sections.invoice_value: Net Weight: 12.5; Gross Weight: 14; DIMS: total weight 14 kg GW / NW 12,5 kg
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – box 7-värdet 12,5 KG NW identifieras i fakturans Net Weight-fält (12.5). GW 14 KG verifieras mot fakturans Gross Weight (14). Ingen motsägelse.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets primära kvantitet (box 7) är 12,5 KG NW. Fakturans Net Weight total anger 12.5. Exakt matchning. Certifikatets GW 14 KG (box 6) matchar fakturans Gross Weight 14. Dessutom bekräftar fakturans DIMS-sektion: 'total weight 14 kg GW / NW 12,5 kg'. Inga motsägelser.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering – certifikatets 'European Community' verifieras mot fakturans 'SE' (Sverige) som är EU-medlemsstat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland är 'EUROPEAN COMMUNITY'. Fakturan anger 'Country of origin: SE'. SE är ISO-kod för Sverige som är EU-27-medlemsstat. Per regel 4.5.4.2 är EU/European Community utbytbart mot specifikt EU-medlemsland. Inga icke-EU-ursprungsländer förekommer i fakturan.

human_readable_report.overall_summary: Alla fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan verifieras fullt ut mot fakturan. Dokumentparet rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five applicable checkpoints returned MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL and no blocking issues.
